badges.title: AI & Tech Novice

event_reference.note: Unity must fire these events to Nakama via badges_check_event RPC

events.quiz_complete: After any quiz ends (any mode). count=1.
events.correct_answer: After quiz. count = correctAnswers from that quiz.
events.fast_answer: Each question answered in <3s. count=1 per fast answer.
events.daily_streak: Fired by StreakShieldManager when streak updates. count=currentStreak.
events.daily_quiz_played: First quiz of each calendar day. count=1.
events.early_quiz: First quiz played before 9:00am local time. count=1.
events.night_quiz: Quiz played between 11pm-4am local time. count=1.
events.comeback_quiz: First quiz after 3+ day absence. count=1.
events.smart_review_session: After completing a Smart Review session. count=1.
events.audio_quiz_played: After completing a Music/Audio quiz. count=1.
events.consecutive_correct: After beating previous best in-a-row correct streak. count=newBest.
events.friend_invited: When a friend invite is sent/accepted. count=1.
events.multiplayer_win: After winning a multiplayer game. count=1.
events.friend_challenge_accepted: After accepting a friend challenge. count=1.
events.group_quiz: After LiveArena game with 4+ players. count=1.
events.combat_win: After winning a LiveArena combat. count=1.
events.most_wanted_achieved: After being voted most wanted in a match. count=1.
events.comeback_win: After winning from last place. count=1.
events.daily_leaderboard_top: After reaching #1 on daily leaderboard. count=1.
events.wager_win: After winning a streak wager. count=1.
events.leaderboard_entry: After appearing on any leaderboard. count=1.
events.unique_topic_played: After playing a new topic for first time. count=totalUniqueTopics.
events.topic_mastered: After mastering a topic (90%+ in 5+ quizzes). count=totalMastered.
events.link_quiz_created: After creating a LinkAndPlay quiz. count=1.
events.image_quiz_played: After playing an image/GuessAnime quiz. count=1.
events.quiz_reach_100_plays: After a created quiz gets 100 plays. count=1.
events.quiz_liked: After created quiz gets positive ratings. count=1.
events.quiz_created: After creating any custom quiz. count=1.
events.topic_quiz_complete: After quiz in a specific topic. count=1. Pass event_data.topic.
events.seasonal_event: Admin-fired for seasonal events. Pass event_data.season.
